# Support

- Security and soundness issues: see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md). Report privately.
- Bugs and feature requests: open an issue with the matching template.
- On-chain programs and the verifier: https://github.com/JatProtocol/jat-program
- SDK, relayer, and indexer: https://github.com/JatProtocol/jat-sdk

These circuits are devnet-grade. The trusted setup is for development.
